recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! Adventures: The Mystery Map
recommendations.overview: When Shaggy and Scooby find a mysterious pirate's treasure map in their triple-extra-large Scooby snack pizza, the whole Mystery Inc. gang sets out from their treehouse to find the lost booty of Gnarlybeard and the Phantom Parrot, encountering some s

recommendations.title: Tarzan & Jane
recommendations.overview: With the first anniversary of her wedding to Tarzan beckoning, Jane ponders how to make it the perfect English celebration.
recommendations.director: Victor Cook, Don MacKinnon, Steve Loter, Lisa Schaffer

recommendations.title: Atlantis: Milo's Return
recommendations.genres: Fantasy, Animation, Science Fiction, Family, Action
recommendations.overview: Milo and Kida reunite with their friends to investigate strange occurances around the world that seem to have links to the secrets of Atlantis.
recommendations.director: Victor Cook, Tad Stones, Toby Shelton

recommendations.title: Ben 10: Destroy All Aliens
recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Family, Action, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Based on the original animated series Ben 10.  Ben becomes targeted by an evil Mechamorph Warrior, named "Retaliator," who mistakenly blames Ben for something he did not do and attempts to destroy all aliens.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! Pirates Ahoy!
recommendations.genres: Fantasy, Animation, Comedy, Family, Mystery, Adventure
recommendations.overview: It's horror on the high seas when Scooby-Doo and the gang take a creepy cruise into one of the world's most mysterious places, the Bermuda Triangle! If Scooby, Shaggy and the gang can't solve this mystery, they may have to walk the plank.

recommendations.title: Happy Halloween, Scooby-Doo!
recommendations.overview: Scooby-Doo and the gang team up with their pals, Bill Nye The Science Guy and Elvira Mistress of the Dark, to solve this mystery of gigantic proportions and save Crystal Cove!

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! in Where's My Mummy?
recommendations.genres: Mystery, Animation, Family, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: Scooby-Doo and the Mystery Inc. gang become involved in a supernatural mystery in Egypt.

recommendations.title: Onward
recommendations.overview: In a suburban fantasy world, two teenage elf brothers embark on an extraordinary quest to discover if there is still a little magic left out there.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! and the Curse of the 13th Ghost
